title: FreeVibrant Shaders
description: A free shader pack inspired by Vibrant Visuals
body:
### Abort
FreeVibrant is a "**FREE**" shader pack for iris inspired by Vibrant Visuals.


<details>
<summary>But why create such a shader pack now?</summary>

There are already a variety of shader packs available for Minecraft, but many of them are bound by strict licenses that limit their use, and in particular many have restrictions on bundling them into modpacks. In most cases, bundling into modpacks is prohibited, or even if it is possible, credits are required.

So I thought there was a need for a shader pack that could be easily bundled into modpacks, and created "FreeVibrant Shaders".

</details>




### Requirements
- Graphics driver supporting OpenGL 3.3 or higher

### Known Issues
- None

### Todo
- Clouds ×
- PBR Support ×
- Distant Horizon Support ×
- Colorwheel Support ☑

### Permissions
This shader pack is unlicensed, so there are no special restrictions.

Feel free to include it in your modpack or submit screenshots.
You can also modify this shader pack to create a new shader pack.

However, please do not reupload it to other mod hosting services under the name "FreeVibrant Shaders."



### Disclaimer
This shader pack is in alpha.
Some visual effects may be broken.

This shader does not support optifine
